title: Marketplace Manager - ID Fresh Food - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - ID Fresh Food - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ID Fresh Food! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
